revision.comment: fix logic similar to other flag core templates
revision.text: [[{{{link alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}} {{{altlink}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}]]{{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }} [[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt=|link=]]{{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Flagright/core]]: Mass importing wikipedia
revision.text: [[{{{link alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}} {{{altlink}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}]]{{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }} [[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt=|link=]]{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: [[{{{link alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}} {{{altlink}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}]]{{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }} [[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt=|link=]]{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: [[{{{link alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}} {{{altlink}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}]]{{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }} [[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt=|link=]]{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: [[{{{link alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}} {{{altlink}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}]]{{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }} [[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt=|link=]]{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flagright%2Fcore here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
